mapper.update: UPDATE score SET teacher_id = #{teacherId}, ai_report_id = #{aiReportId}, doc_score = #{docScore}, attendance_score = #{attendanceScore}, system_score = #{systemScore}, defense_score = #{defenseScore}, total_score = #{totalScore}, teacher_comment = #{teacherComment}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE score_id = #{scoreId}
UPDATE score SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE score_id = #{scoreId}
mapper.select: SELECT ss.student_score_id, ss.score_id, ss.team_id, ti.team_name, ss.student_id, st.student_name, ss.contribution_factor, ss.personal_score, ss.grade, ss.teacher_comment FROM student_score ss LEFT JOIN team_info ti ON ss.team_id = ti.team_id LEFT JOIN student st ON ss.student_id = st.student_id WHERE ss.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY ss.create_time DESC

SELECT s.score_id, ti.team_id, ti.team_name, pt.topic_id, pt.topic_name, COALESCE(s.teacher_id, pt.teacher_id) AS teacher_id, COALESCE(t.teacher_name, topic_teacher.teacher_name) AS teacher_name, COALESCE(s.doc_score, ROUND(COALESCE(pa.weighted_doc_score, 0) * 0.15, 2)) AS doc_score, COALESCE(s.attendance_score, 0) AS attendance_score, COALESCE(s.system_score, ROUND(COALESCE(pa.weighted_system_score, 0) * 0.50, 2)) AS system_score, COALESCE(s.defense_score, 0) AS defense_score, COALESCE( s.total_score, ROUND( ROUND(COALESCE(pa.weighted_doc_score, 0) * 0.15, 2) + COALESCE(s.attendance_score, 0) + ROUND(COALESCE(pa.weighted_system_score, 0) * 0.50, 2) + COALESCE(s.defense_score, 0), 2 ) ) AS total_score, COALESCE(pa.total_stage_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stage_task)) AS total_stage_count, COALESCE(pa.evaluated_stage_count, 0) AS evaluated_stage_count, COALESCE(pa.total_stage_weight, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(weight), 0) FROM stage_task)) AS total_stage_weight, COALESCE(pa.evaluated_stage_weight, 0) AS evaluated_stage_weight, COALESCE(pa.weighted_stage_score, 0) AS process_score, COALESCE(pa.weighted_doc_score, 0) AS process_doc_score, COALESCE(pa.weighted_system_score, 0) AS process_system_score, ROUND(COALESCE(pa.weighted_doc_score, 0) * 0.15, 2) AS suggested_doc_score, ROUND(COALESCE(pa.weighted_system_score, 0) * 0.50, 2) AS suggested_system_score, s.teacher_comment, COALESCE(s.status, 0) AS status, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM team_info ti INNER JOIN ( SELECT team_id, MAX(selection_id) AS selection_id FROM topic_selection WHERE audit_status = 1 GROUP BY team_id ) selected ON selected.team_id = ti.team_id INNER JOIN topic_selection ts ON ts.selection_id = selected.selection_id LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON ts.topic_id = pt.topic_id LEFT JOIN score s ON s.team_id = ti.team_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON s.teacher_id = t.teacher_id LEFT JOIN teacher topic_teacher ON pt.teacher_id = topic_teacher.teacher_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT se.team_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stage_task) AS total_stage_count, COUNT(DISTINCT se.stage_id) AS evaluated_stage_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(weight), 0) FROM stage_task) AS total_stage_weight, COALESCE(SUM(st.weight), 0) AS evaluated_stage_weight, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(se.total_score), 0), 2) AS average_stage_score, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(se.total_score * st.weight) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(weight) FROM stage_task), 0), 0), 2) AS weighted_stage_score, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(se.doc_score * st.weight) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(weight) FROM stage_task), 0), 0), 2) AS weighted_doc_score, ROUND( COALESCE( SUM(((se.completion_score + COALESCE(se.innovation_score, 0) + COALESCE(se.tech_score, 0)) / 3) * st.weight) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(weight) FROM stage_task), 0), 0 ), 2 ) AS weighted_system_score FROM stage_evaluation se INNER JOIN stage_task st ON se.stage_id = st.stage_id GROUP BY se.team_id ) pa ON pa.team_id = ti.team_id WHERE ti.is_deleted = 0 AND ti.team_status <> 3
AND (s.teacher_id = #{teacherId} OR pt.teacher_id = #{teacherId})
ORDER BY total_score DESC, ti.team_id ASC
